profiles.name: Bambu Lab P1S

retraction.note: Short retraction due to direct drive; Bambu firmware uses firmware retraction

special_notes: Enclosed chamber — great for ABS/ASA/PA
Multi-axis vibration compensation built-in
Use Bambu Studio for best results
AMS multi-material system available as optional upgrade

profiles.name: Bambu Lab X1 Carbon

retraction.note: Firmware retraction recommended; very short due to direct drive + high-speed system

special_notes: Flagship model with AI-assisted print monitoring via LiDAR
Carbon fiber reinforced construction reduces vibration
Enclosed chamber supports engineering materials (PC, PA-CF)
AMS 4-material system standard
Hardened steel nozzle recommended for abrasive filaments

profiles.name: Bambu Lab A1

retraction.note: Open frame; slightly higher retraction than enclosed models

special_notes: Open frame — not suitable for ABS/ASA without enclosure
AMS Lite 4-material system available
Best for PLA and PETG
Quieter operation than X1C/P1S at similar speeds
Auto bed leveling and vibration compensation included

profiles.name: Prusa MK4

retraction.note: Input shaper eliminates need for high retraction; firmware retraction available

profiles.bed_surface: Smooth PEI, textured PEI, or satin PEI sheet
special_notes: Load cell-based bed leveling — extremely accurate Z offset
Input shaper for high-speed quality printing
Nextruder with lower gear ratio for precise extrusion
Compatible with Prusa MMU3 for multi-material printing
Open frame — use enclosure or cardboard tent for ABS/ASA

profiles.name: Prusa MK3S+

retraction.note: Standard direct drive retraction; Bondtech BMG extruder

profiles.bed_surface: Smooth PEI, textured PEI, or satin PEI sheet (magnetic)
special_notes: Bondtech BMG extruder with dual-drive grip
PINDA 2 probe for mesh bed leveling
Compatible with Prusa MMU2S for multi-material
Well-tested, reliable workhorse printer
Many community mods and upgrades available

profiles.name: Prusa Mini+

retraction.note: Short Bowden (~30cm); lower retraction than typical Bowden printers

special_notes: Compact form factor with short Bowden tube
MINTEMP/MAXTEMP protection with SuperPINDA
Good entry point into Prusa ecosystem
Not ideal for flexible filaments due to Bowden design
Small build plate limits part size

profiles.name: Creality Ender 3 V3

retraction.note: Direct drive with Creality Sprite extruder; short retraction needed

special_notes: Input shaper for high-speed printing
CoreXZ kinematic system for fast, quiet movement
CR Touch auto leveling included
Open frame — ABS/ASA requires enclosure
Good value for speed; Klipper firmware available as alternative

profiles.name: Creality Ender 3 S1

retraction.note: Sprite Pro direct drive extruder with dual-drive gears

profiles.bed_surface: PEI flexible spring steel or glass
special_notes: Sprite Pro extruder with high-temperature capability (300°C max)
CR Touch auto bed leveling
Lead screw Z axis — prone to Z wobble if not maintained
Good for flexible filaments due to direct drive
Popular community printer with extensive mod support

profiles.name: Voron 2.4

retraction.note: Stealthburner with Clockwork 2 extruder; firmware retraction + pressure advance in Klipper

profiles.bed_surface: Textured PEI, smooth PEI, or G10
special_notes: Fully enclosed CoreXY for high-temp engineering materials
Klipper firmware with full configurability: input shaping, pressure advance, resonance compensation
Magnetic bed with removable spring steel PEI sheet
Self-sourced community build — requires advanced mechanical and electrical knowledge
4-point independent Z leveling (Quad Gantry Level)
Multiple build volumes available: 250, 300, 350mm
Print quality comparable to commercial printers costing 3-5x more
